cent toward repairing the old or
building new bridge?


City Engineer Mcintyre says now
that the old bridge can not be re-
paired and that a new one is neces-
sary.


Why did not the city officials
know this when they gave the
Washington Water Power company
a franchise over this bridge and
provide specifically for new one ?
That, the taxpayer has a right to
know.


Instead they granted franchise
providing only for repairing an old
structure at the expense of the
company getting it. That company
is now claiming it should not pay
for a new bridge, if the city engi-
neer says the old one is unfit for
use for street car purposes.


The conclusion of this company
is not logical one. If the old
bridge can not be repaired for
street car purposes, it follows most
logically that that company should
build a new one.


Ii the city grants one cent of
the peoples money to the Wash
ington Water Power company for
a new bridge, it is case of grab
